'''magugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wulver|wulver]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-g-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wulver|wulver]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| magugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mægigith|mægigith]] || [[word:mægigij|mægigij]] || [[word:mægigish|mægigish]] || [[word:mægigi|mægigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:maguguguth|maguguguth]] || [[word:maguguguj|maguguguj]] || [[word:magugugush|magugugush]] || [[word:magugugu|magugugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:maguguth|maguguth]] || [[word:maguguj|maguguj]] || [[word:magugush|magugush]] || [[word:magugu|magugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:magufguth|magufguth]] || [[word:magufguj|magufguj]] || [[word:magufgush|magufgush]] || [[word:magufguf|magufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:maguguthu|maguguthu]] || [[word:maguguju|maguguju]] || [[word:magugushu|magugushu]] || [[word:maguguku|maguguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:maguguth|maguguth]] || [[word:maguguj|maguguj]] || [[word:magugush|magugush]] || [[word:magugu|magugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:maguguthul|maguguthul]] || [[word:magugujul|magugujul]] || [[word:magugushul|magugushul]] || [[word:magugukul|magugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:maguguthuthu|maguguthuthu]] || [[word:magugujuju|magugujuju]] || [[word:magugushushu|magugushushu]] || [[word:maguguku|maguguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:maguguthun|maguguthun]] || [[word:magugujun|magugujun]] || [[word:magugushun|magugushun]] || [[word:magugukun|magugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:maguguthuoro|maguguthuoro]] || [[word:magugujuoro|magugujuoro]] || [[word:magugushuoro|magugushuoro]] || [[word:magugukuoro|magugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
